title: pinus tabuliformis var. tabuliformis
intro: Pinus tabuliformis var. tabuliformis, also known as Chinese nut pine or Japanese nut pine, is a variety of evergreen coniferous tree native to the mountainous regions of China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, derived from its resin and essential oils. The health benefits of Pinus tabuliformis var. tabuliformis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including bronchitis, pneumonia, and other respiratory conditions.
